table.name: vtiger_pymentssystem
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_pymentssystem` ( `pymentssystemid` int(19) NOT NULL, `payer_title` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_payer_token` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_payer_ip_1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_payer_ip_2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_payer_ip_3` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_deeplink_check` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_deeplinkid` bigint(19) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_deeplink_username` varchar(62) DEFAULT '', `cf_deeplink_password` varchar(62) DEFAULT '', `cf_service_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_server_address` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_deeplink_image` varchar(62) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`pymentssystemid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_pymentssystemcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_pymentssystemcf` ( `pymentssystemid` int(19) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`pymentssystemid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
